seo.title: Falls Prevention Buyers Guide | Able Care
seo.description: Everything you need to brief procurement on falls prevention technology. Evaluate, pilot, deploy and scale. Download the 24-page guide.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Woman reading Able Care product brochure
blocks.headline: The falls prevention buyers guide.
blocks.subtitle: Everything you need to brief procurement on falls prevention technology. 24 pages covering evidence, features, pricing, integration and rollout.

blocks.heading: Brief your team in 24 pages
blocks.promoBody: The Falls Prevention Buyers Guide covers everything procurement needs to know: the evidence base, feature comparison, integration requirements, pricing models and rollout timelines. Written for operators, approved by clinicians.

blocks.heading: From evaluation to scale in four steps

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.description: Use this guide to compare falls prevention approaches against your setting, staff mix and regulatory requirements.

steps.title: Pilot
steps.description: Run a 30-day pilot at a single site. Measure screening time, staff adoption and baseline risk distribution.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: Roll out the standardized protocol to every branch, community or clinical site. Training takes minutes, not days.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: Use population-level dashboards to track outcomes, protect HHVBP and VBP performance and demonstrate ROI to stakeholders.

blocks.heading: Ready to evaluate Able Assess for your organization?
blocks.bodyText: Download the guide or book a demo with our clinical team.
